case_title: WEN CONG LI VS. ISAIAH HIGGINS

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LI, WEN CONG AS TO DEFENDANT HIGGINS, ISAIAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-27-2012 - JUDGMENT.APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. SIMON WU INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONSES/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, WEN CONG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HIGGINS, ISAIAH $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,095.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-27-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HIGGINS, ISAIAH
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT HIGGINS, ISAIAH HEARING SET FOR JUN-21-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO ISAIAH HIGGINS 647 E. 17TH STREET #132;OAKLAND,CA. 94606

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-21-2012 IS CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-23-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-23-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: OEX CONTINUED ORDER MAILED 6/21/12 TO DEFENDANT ISAIAH HIGGINS, "ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN".
RETURN MAIL: ORDER OF EXAMINATION - OFF CALENDAR ORDER SENT TO PLAINTIFF
